response.original_title: The Last Day of Byron Bray
response.overview: Legendary character actor William Sadler (The Shawshank Redemption, Bill & Ted’s Bogus Journey) delivers an unexpectedly heartfelt turn as an elderly gay man who has a dream portending his nearing death and tries to impart some final wisdom to his young friend in this stirring film featuring music from M83 and Japandroids.
response.title: The Last Day of Byron Bray
